name: tdai-memory
description: Long-term + symbolic short-term memory for AI coding agents, powered by TencentDB Agent Memory.

interface.shortDescription: Long-term + short-term memory for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Adds long-term memory and symbolic short-term memory to Codex CLI: automatic recall before every prompt (relevant past memories injected via additionalContext), automatic capture after every turn (L0 conversation written, L1/L2/L3 atoms/scenarios/persona extracted in the background), and manual control via skills (memory-search, memory-status, memory-clear-session). Memory is partitioned per project (hash of cwd) by default. The daemon runs locally on 127.0.0.1 with a Bearer-token-protected HTTP API (file mode 0600).
defaultPrompt: Do you remember what we discussed about this project?
Search my memory for the migration plan we made last week
What were my preferences for the API design?
